title: selaginella neei
intro: Selaginella neei, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its delicate, spiky foliage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella neei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
